scripts.test:mocha:ci: mkdir -p coverage/mocha .tmp/junit/backend-mocha && chmod -R 777 coverage/mocha .tmp/junit/backend-mocha || true && bash -c 'docker compose --profile portal -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.mocha.yml up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from redboxportal redboxportal; status=$?; docker compose --profile portal -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.mocha.yml down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.test:mocha:mount: bash -c 'docker compose --profile mount -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.mocha.yml up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from redboxportal-mount redboxportal-mount; status=$?; docker compose --profile mount -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.mocha.yml down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.test:bruno:oidc: npm run test:bruno:clean && npm run test:bruno:oidc:mount
scripts.test:bruno:general: npm run test:bruno:clean && npm run test:bruno:general:mount
scripts.test:bruno:s3: npm run test:bruno:s3:clean && npm run test:bruno:s3:mount
scripts.test:bruno:s3:ci: bash -c 'compose="docker compose --profile ci -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.bruno.s3.yml"; $compose up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from bruno; status=$?; $compose down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.test:bruno:s3:mount: bash -c 'compose="docker compose --profile mount -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.bruno.s3.yml"; $compose up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from bruno-mount; status=$?; $compose down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.test:playwright: npm run test:playwright:clean && npm run test:playwright:mount
scripts.test:playwright:ci: bash -c 'docker compose --profile ci -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.playwright.yml up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright; status=$?; docker compose --profile ci -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.playwright.yml down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.test:playwright:mount: bash -c 'docker compose --profile mount -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.playwright.yml up --menu=false --abort-on-container-exit --exit-code-from playwright-mount; status=$?; docker compose --profile mount -f ./support/integration-testing/docker-compose.playwright.yml down -v --remove-orphans --timeout 180; exit $status'
scripts.doc-ng2: npm -g install @compodoc/compodoc aglio && compodoc -p angular/tsconfig.json -d support/docs/generated/ng2 -n "ReDBox Portal - NG2 Apps" --theme postmark --includes support/docs && npm run doc:api -- --branding=default --portal=rdmp && aglio -i support/docs/generated/api/apidocs.apib -o rest-api.html && mv rest-api.html support/docs/generated/ng2/additional-documentation/
scripts.validate:api-routes: cd packages/redbox-core && TS_NODE_PROJECT=test/tsconfig.json ../../node_modules/.bin/mocha --no-config --require ts-node/register --require test/setup.ts test/unit/api-routes.test.ts
scripts.compile:core: cd packages/redbox-core && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && node_modules/.bin/tsc && cd ../../
scripts.compile:server: npm run compile:raido && npm run compile:sails-ng-common && npm run compile:agenda-sqs && npm run compile:core && npm run compile:storage-mongo && npm run compile:sails
scripts.compile:all: npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run compile:raido && npm run compile:rva && npm run compile:sails-ng-common && npm run compile:agenda-sqs && npm run compile:core && npm run compile:dev-tools && npm run compile:storage-mongo && npm run compile:sails && npm run compile:ng && npm run webpack
scripts.compile:core:prod: cd packages/redbox-core && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && node_modules/.bin/tsc && cd ../../
scripts.compile:sails-ng-common: cd ./packages/sails-ng-common && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run compile:clean && npm run compile && cd ../../
scripts.compile:raido: cd ./packages/raido && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../../
scripts.compile:rva: cd ./packages/rva-registry && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../../
scripts.compile:storage-mongo: cd ./packages/sails-hook-redbox-storage-mongo && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../../
scripts.compile:dev-tools: cd packages/redbox-dev-tools && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../../
scripts.compile:agenda-sqs: cd ./packages/agenda-sqs-backend && npm install --no-save --ignore-scripts --strict-peer-deps && npm run build && cd ../../
scripts.dev:all: npm run compile:sails && npm run compile:ng && npm run dev:run
